name: California Cash Advance
description_short: California Cash Advance offers payday loans with same-day funding through physical locations in El Monte and Bellflower. Claims direct lending with no hidden fees and a simple application process.
description_long: California Cash Advance operates as a direct payday lender with at least two physical locations in the Los Angeles area: El Monte (2821 North Peck Rd., Suite C) and Bellflower (17161-3 Bellflower Blvd.). The company positions itself within the emergency cash lending market, targeting consumers who need quick access to funds between paychecks. The El Monte location operates Monday-Friday 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. and Saturday 9 a.m. to 1 p.m., with convenient street-level access near neighboring businesses. The company offers payday loans as its primary product, described as short-term borrowing solutions repaid on the borrower's next payday. Marketing emphasizes a direct lender model with claimed transparency around fees and a streamlined application process. California Cash Advance also runs a referral program offering compensation to customers and non-customers who refer new borrowers, suggesting an affiliate-marketing component to customer acquisition. Customer reviews on the website highlight specific staff members (Sandy, Debbie, Mercedes) and praise customer service quality, relationship-building, and accessibility compared to competing lenders. The company's website is hosted under the Flexible Finance Loans domain structure, suggesting possible corporate ownership or brand aggregation. However, the website provides no disclosure of APR rates, loan terms, maximum loan amounts, eligibility requirements, or state licensing information—critical details for payday lending. No information about credit checks, income verification, or repayment consequences is publicly visible. The lack of transparent pricing and regulatory disclosures is a significant limitation for consumer evaluation.
address: 2821 Peck Rd c, South El Monte, CA 91733

company_info.headquarters: 2821 Peck Rd c, South El Monte, CA 91733

pros: Direct lender model eliminates middleman fees
Multiple physical locations in Los Angeles area for in-person service
Extended weekday hours (9 a.m.–6 p.m.) and Saturday availability (9 a.m.–1 p.m.)
Advertises simple application process for quick funding
Referral program offers cash compensation for customer referrals
Specific staff members named in positive customer reviews suggesting accountability
Conveniently located near complementary businesses with clear directional guidance
cons: Website provides zero disclosure of APR rates, loan terms, or maximum loan amounts
No information about credit requirements, income verification, or eligibility criteria
No details on repayment consequences, default fees, or rollover policies
Payday loans are typically high-cost debt with rates often exceeding 300% APR—significantly riskier than alternatives
Website lacks state licensing numbers or regulatory compliance documentation required for payday lenders in California
best_for: Consumers with urgent cash needs before payday who have no access to credit alternatives
Borrowers with established income (paycheck-dependent) seeking same-day or next-day funding
Local El Monte and Bellflower residents preferring in-person lending transactions
diagnosis: California Cash Advance is best for employed consumers in the El Monte/Bellflower area with immediate cash needs and paycheck-based income who prefer in-person transactions. Critical caveat: payday loans carry extremely high interest rates and fees (often 300%+ APR) and create debt traps for struggling borrowers; the company's website omits all pricing and repayment details, making true cost comparison impossible before application. Consumers should exhaust alternatives (credit unions, employer advances, credit counseling) before considering payday lending.
services: Payday loans (short-term cash advances repaid on next paycheck)
In-person loan application at physical locations
Same-day or expedited funding (implied but not explicitly stated)
Referral compensation program for customer acquisition
Flexible loan amounts (specific range not disclosed)
